scheme_name: HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth
exit_load: Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 1 month
benchmark: CRISIL Short Duration Debt A-II Index
about_fund:
About HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Debt Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Anil Bamboli is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹34.64.
The HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated Moderate risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100.
